svg.style: background: #ffffff; background-color: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212)); color-scheme: light dark;

page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1169" pageHeight="827" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="2" value="User" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;fontColor=#333333;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="460" y="100" width="200" height="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="zone0" value="External Identity Provider" style="swimlane;startSize=30;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontColor=#574a00;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;dashed=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="40" y="590" width="340" height="130" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="lux" value="LuxTrust<br><font style='font-size:11px;font-weight:normal;'>National eID width="130" height="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="eidas" value="eIDAS<br><font style='font-size:11px;font-weight:normal;'>EU cross-border identity</font>" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffdf80;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontColor=#574a00;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;" parent="zone0" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="190" y="45" width="130" height="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="3" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;" parent="1" source="2" target="4" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="idp_arrow" value="SAML / OIDC" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;fontSize=11;dashed=1;" parent="1" source="zone0" target="6" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="4" value="Auth Gateway<br><font style='font-size:11px;font-weight:normal;'>Intercepts requests &amp; orchestrates checks</font>" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontColor=#6a1e1e;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="335" y="220" width="450" height="70" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="zone1" value="External IAM" style="swimlane;startSize=30;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;fontColor=#333333;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;dashed=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="60" y="360" width="560" height="130" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="6" value="Identity Store<br><font style='font-size:11px;font-weight:normal;'>Users, credentials, attributes</font>" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;fontColor=#4a235a;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;" parent="zone1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="40" y="40" width="220" height="70" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="7" value="Role Management<br><font style='font-size:11px;font-weight:normal;'>Coarse-grained (RBAC)</font>" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;fontColor=#4a235a;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;" parent="zone1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="300" y="40" width="220" height="70" style="swimlane;startSize=30;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;fontColor=#333333;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;dashed=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="660" y="360" width="420" height="260" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="8" value="Permission Management<br><font style='font-size:11px;font-weight:normal;'>Fine-grained (ABAC / ReBAC)</font>" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;fontColor=#4a235a;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;" parent="zone2" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="90" y="40" width="240" height="70"
